name: BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server
notes: This building block monitors the MS event 4769 for failure which implies possible TGT  PAC Forgery.
bb_references: BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (5000582) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket was rejected
when the event matches Status Code (custom) is any of [0x3c or 0xf]
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000582) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket was rejected
AND when the event matches Status Code (custom) is any of [0x3c or 0xf]
